goal: Build a per-project Definition-of-Done plus a coverage check for Pi-Dev-Ops so the autonomous loop stops reporting 'done' when project-level work is actually missing (the loop currently terminates on the per-task judge GOAL_MET in tao_loop.run_until_done, with no project-completeness gate).

win_condition.statement: A DoD schema is documented and a project's DoD is a persisted list of {id, statement, check:auto|human, probe} items at .harness/dod/<project>.dod.json
win_condition.probe: Load .harness/dod/pi-dev-ops.dod.json; assert it validates against .harness/dod/schema.json and every item has id/statement/check/probe

win_condition.statement: coverage_check(project_id) loads a DoD, runs each auto probe, and returns a structured report with per-item present|partial|absent|unknown, an aggregate coverage_ratio, and an unmet[] list
win_condition.probe: pytest tests/test_coverage_check.py; calling coverage_check on a seeded fixture returns the expected unmet set

win_condition.statement: Probes are sandboxed and side-effect-free: a failing or hanging probe yields 'unknown' for that item and never raises into the caller
win_condition.probe: Inject a raising probe and a hanging probe; assert the report still returns with those items marked unknown and no exception propagates

win_condition.statement: tao_loop.run_until_done no longer terminates done=True on judge GOAL_MET alone for project-scoped runs; it additionally requires coverage_ratio >= TAO_COVERAGE_MIN (default 1.0 for auto items) and empty unmet[], else reason=COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE
win_condition.probe: pytest tests/test_tao_loop_coverage.py: judge mocked GOAL_MET + DoD with one unmet auto item -> LoopResult.done is False and reason == 'COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE'

win_condition.statement: Each unmet DoD item is filed as a Linear ticket in the correct project/team via .harness/projects.json routing, idempotently (no duplicates on re-run)
win_condition.probe: 2 unmet items + mocked Linear client -> exactly 2 save_issue calls with project_id f45212be-3259-4bfb-89b1-54c122c939a7 and team_id a8a52f07-63cf-4ece-9ad2-3e3bd3c15673; second run same set -> 0 new calls

win_condition.statement: A converter turns win_condition[] (with probe) from a forward-plan.json into a project .dod.json; the forward-planner plan is the canonical DoD source
win_condition.probe: Feed this plan's own JSON through the converter; output validates against the DoD schema and item count equals win_condition length

win_condition.statement: Every coverage run writes one row to a Supabase coverage_runs table (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shipped in supabase/migration.sql), fire-and-forget
win_condition.probe: Run coverage with a mocked observability client -> one insert with project_id, coverage_ratio, unmet_count; an observability failure does not block the run

win_condition.statement: A CI coverage-gate workflow runs the coverage check on pi-dev-ops's own DoD and fails the build if auto coverage < threshold, with concurrency + fork guard
win_condition.probe: Workflow file present and parses; a red fixture run exits non-zero; workflow includes concurrency and repository == 'CleanExpo/Pi-Dev-Ops' guard

win_condition.statement: Every 'done' surface (loop LoopResult, session streamer, six-pager, board memos) sources completeness from coverage, not the judge verdict; non-empty unmet[] suppresses any done/completed emission
win_condition.probe: Grep done-emitters; test that a non-empty unmet[] suppresses the done/completed emission in each emitter

win_condition.statement: Any change to a project's DoD is surfaced for human approval and never self-authored silently by the loop (launch-charter governance)
win_condition.probe: A DoD edit PR carries the manifest checklist and a diff of DoD items; reviewer confirms no silent weakening; loop writes to .dod.json are path-guarded/rejected

win_condition.statement: human-checked DoD items are never auto-marked satisfied; they surface as human_pending and block terminal 'done' until a human signs off
win_condition.probe: A DoD with one human item can never reach complete=true via probes alone (test); item appears in human_pending[]

win_condition.statement: An operator runbook exists covering how to author a DoD, read a coverage report, interpret unknown vs absent, and force-stop a stuck coverage gate
win_condition.probe: .harness/runbooks/coverage-check.md exists and references the kill-switch and the TAO_COVERAGE_MIN env var

moves.title: DoD schema + spec doc
moves.deliverable: .harness/dod/schema.json plus a short spec defining a DoD item {id, statement, check, probe} and the file convention .harness/dod/<project>.dod.json
moves.verify: schema.json parses; a hand-written pi-dev-ops.dod.json validates against it

moves.title: Probe descriptor model + registry
moves.deliverable: Typed probe descriptor (kinds: http_2xx, pytest, file_exists, sql_columns, grep, shell) and a dispatch registry mapping kind to runner
moves.verify: Unit test instantiates each kind; an unknown kind raises an explicit error at load time, not at run time

moves.title: Sandboxed probe runner
moves.deliverable: run_probe(descriptor) -> {result: present|partial|absent|unknown, detail} with per-probe timeout, exception isolation, and no writes
moves.verify: Test that a raising probe and a hanging probe both yield 'unknown'; a passing probe yields 'present' and a failing one 'absent'

moves.title: coverage_check(project_id) aggregator
moves.deliverable: swarm/gap_detector.py::coverage_check loads the DoD, runs each auto probe via the runner, returns CoverageReport{items[], coverage_ratio, unmet[], human_pending[]}
moves.verify: pytest tests/test_coverage_check.py on a fixture DoD returns the expected unmet/human_pending partition

branches.decider: probe execution location (security review of probe kinds in m2)
probe execution location (security review of probe kinds in m2)

moves.title: human vs auto enforcement
moves.deliverable: coverage_check never marks a human item satisfied via probe; such items land in human_pending[] and count against completeness
moves.verify: A DoD with one human item can never reach complete=true from probes alone (test)

moves.title: forward-plan -> DoD converter
moves.deliverable: Converter mapping win_condition[] (with probe) from a forward-plan.json to <project>.dod.json
moves.verify: Feed this plan's JSON through it; output validates against the m1 schema and item count equals win_condition length

moves.title: coverage_runs table + migration
moves.deliverable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS coverage_runs (...) added to supabase/migration.sql plus a writer in observability.py
moves.verify: Migration re-runs idempotently; mocked client receives one insert per coverage run

moves.title: Fire-and-forget observability wiring
moves.deliverable: coverage_check emits a coverage_runs event through the existing fire-and-forget path; observability failure never blocks the run
moves.verify: Inject a failing observability client -> coverage still returns; one attempted insert logged

moves.title: Loop terminal-gate on coverage
moves.deliverable: In tao_loop.run_until_done, when verdict.done for a project-scoped run, call coverage_check; set done=True only if coverage_ratio >= TAO_COVERAGE_MIN and unmet[] empty, else reason=COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE
moves.verify: tests/test_tao_loop_coverage.py: judge mocked GOAL_MET + one unmet auto item -> done is False, reason == 'COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE'

branches.if: keep iterating to close the gap
stop-and-report, next cycle picks up tickets

moves.title: LoopResult carries coverage
moves.deliverable: LoopResult gains coverage: CoverageReport | None plus unmet_ids
moves.verify: Result object exposes unmet ids in the gated test

moves.title: Idempotent Linear ticketing for unmet[]
moves.deliverable: gap_detector files each unmet item as a Linear issue routed via projects.json, keyed by dod_item_id for dedupe
moves.verify: 2 unmet -> 2 save_issue calls with correct project/team ids; re-run same set -> 0 new

branches.if: one rolled-up checklist issue per run

moves.title: Routing fallback + unknown-project handling
moves.deliverable: When linear_project_id is null (e.g. oh-my-codex) file at team level; when project_id is absent from registry raise a clear config error rather than silently dropping
moves.verify: Test both branches: null project_id -> team-level file; missing project_id -> explicit error

moves.title: Done-reporting reads coverage at every surface
moves.deliverable: Loop streamer, six-pager, and board done-emitters read coverage.complete instead of judge reason; non-empty unmet[] suppresses any done/completed text
moves.verify: Test that an incomplete coverage report suppresses the done emission in each emitter (streamer, six-pager, board)

moves.title: Seed pi-dev-ops DoD from this plan (dogfood)
moves.deliverable: Run the m6 converter on this forward-plan.json to produce .harness/dod/pi-dev-ops.dod.json -- the system's first real DoD
moves.verify: coverage_check('pi-dev-ops') runs end-to-end and returns a report

moves.title: CI coverage-gate workflow
moves.deliverable: .github/workflows/coverage-gate.yml runs coverage_check('pi-dev-ops'), fails build if auto coverage < threshold, with concurrency: coverage-gate, cancel-in-progress, and repository == 'CleanExpo/Pi-Dev-Ops' fork guard
moves.verify: Workflow parses; a red fixture exits non-zero; guard present

moves.title: DoD-change governance gate
moves.deliverable: A check (pre-commit / CI) flags any diff to .harness/dod/*.dod.json and requires the PR manifest checklist + human approval; the loop is path-guarded from editing DoD files
moves.verify: A simulated loop write to a .dod.json is rejected; a human PR with the checklist passes

moves.title: Probe-failure alerting / drift
moves.deliverable: Sustained 'unknown' (probe broken, not feature absent) is distinguished from 'absent' and surfaces as a separate alert so a broken probe cannot masquerade as missing-feature or silently pass
moves.verify: Test that unknown items are reported in their own bucket and trigger an alert path, never a 'done'

moves.title: Operator runbook + end-to-end dogfood proof
moves.deliverable: .harness/runbooks/coverage-check.md (authoring DoD, reading reports, unknown vs absent, force-stopping the gate via kill-switch) plus an end-to-end proof run on pi-dev-ops DoD showing unmet>0 -> complete as moves land
moves.verify: Runbook exists and references kill-switch + TAO_COVERAGE_MIN; e2e proof captured

risks.risk: A broken probe reads as 'absent', causing the loop to 'fix' a non-problem or never report done
risks.response: Probe failures isolate to 'unknown' (m3); sustained unknown alerts separately (m17)

risks.risk: Coverage gate becomes a hang vector when a probe hits a dead endpoint
risks.response: Per-probe timeout (m3) plus existing HARD_STOP kill-switch documented in runbook (m18)

risks.risk: Ticket spam: large DoD floods Linear with unmet-item tickets
risks.response: Idempotent dedupe by dod_item_id (m11), rolled-up-issue branch, and the 3-PR/day autonomy rate limit

risks.risk: Loop deadlocks on a human DoD item that can't auto-pass
risks.response: Intended, but made legible: human_pending[] reported distinctly so a human knows the loop waits on them (m5, m13)

risks.risk: Goodhart: the loop weakens its own DoD to make coverage pass
risks.response: Path-guard .dod.json against loop writes and require human-approved diffs (m16)

risks.risk: coverage_runs declared but never written, or written to a missing table (recurring CLAUDE.md bug)
risks.response: Ship CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and the writer in the same change with a write-path test (m7, m8)

risks.risk: TAO_COVERAGE_MIN set below 1.0 silently re-admits false completion for auto items
risks.response: Default 1.0 for auto items; document the knob and its danger in the runbook (m18)

risks.risk: Other judge callers (board_meeting, tdd_pipeline, feedback_loop) still report false done outside tao_loop
risks.response: wc9 + m13 make every done-emitter source completeness from coverage; grep audit catches new uncovered emitters
